en: And the LORD said to Moses, "Speak to the priests, the sons of Aaron, and say to them: 'No one shall make himself unclean for the dead among his people,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要告訴亞倫子孫作祭司的，對他們說：祭司不可在自己的族人中因死人玷污自己，

en: except for his closest relatives, his mother, his father, his son, his daughter, his brother,
zh: 除非骨肉至親，例如父母、兒女、兄弟，

en: or his virgin sister (who is near to him because she has had no husband; for her he may make himself unclean).
zh: 或是仍是處女，未曾出嫁的姊妹等至親，祭司才可以玷污自己。

en: He shall not make himself unclean as a husband among his people and so profane himself.
zh: 祭司不可為了姻親而玷污，褻瀆自己的聖職 。

en: They shall not make bald patches on their heads, nor shave off the edges of their beards, nor make any cuts on their body.
zh: 祭司不可剃光頭髮，鬍鬚的周圍不可剃掉，也不可紋身。

en: They shall be holy to their God and not profane the name of their God. For they offer the LORD's food offerings, the bread of their God; therefore they shall be holy.
zh: 他們要成為聖，歸向他們的 神，不可褻瀆他們 神的名，因為他們奉獻耶和華的火祭，他們 神的食物，所以他們要成為聖。

en: They shall not marry a prostitute or a woman who has been defiled, neither shall they marry a woman divorced from her husband, for the priest is holy to his God.
zh: 祭司不可娶被玷辱了的妓女為妻，也不可娶被丈夫離棄的女人為妻；因為祭司是歸他的 神為聖的。

en: You shall sanctify him, for he offers the bread of your God. He shall be holy to you, for I, the LORD, who sanctify you, am holy.
zh: 所以你要使他分別為聖，因為他把食物獻給你的 神；你要以他為聖，因為我耶和華使你們分別為聖的，是聖潔的。

en: And the daughter of any priest, if she profanes herself by whoring, profanes her father; she shall be burned with fire.
zh: 如果祭司的女兒羞辱自己去作妓女，就是羞辱了自己的父親；她必須用火燒死。

en: "The priest who is chief among his brothers, on whose head the anointing oil is poured and who has been consecrated to wear the garments, shall not let the hair of his head hang loose nor tear his clothes.
zh: “在兄弟中作大祭司的，頭上倒了膏油，又受了聖職，得以穿著聖衣，就不可披頭散髮，也不可撕裂衣服。

en: He shall not go in to any dead bodies nor make himself unclean, even for his father or for his mother.
zh: 不可走近死屍，也不可為了父母玷污自己。

en: He shall not go out of the sanctuary, lest he profane the sanctuary of his God, for the consecration of the anointing oil of his God is on him: I am the LORD.
zh: 他不可走出聖所，也不可褻瀆他 神的聖所，因為他 神膏立了他，使他分別為聖，我是耶和華。

en: And he shall take a wife in her virginity.
zh: 他要娶處女為妻。

en: A widow, or a divorced woman, or a woman who has been defiled, or a prostitute, these he shall not marry. But he shall take as his wife a virgin of his own people,
zh: 寡婦、被休的婦人、受玷辱的妓女，他都不可以娶；他只可以娶自己族人中的處女為妻。

en: that he may not profane his offspring among his people, for I am the LORD who sanctifies him."
zh: 不可在自己的族人中，羞辱他的後裔，因為我是使他們分別為聖的耶和華。”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to Aaron, saying, None of your offspring throughout their generations who has a blemish may approach to offer the bread of his God.
zh: “你要告訴亞倫：你世世代代的後裔中，有殘疾的，就不可走近來獻他 神的食物。

en: For no one who has a blemish shall draw near, a man blind or lame, or one who has a mutilated face or a limb too long,
zh: 因為有殘疾的，無論是瞎眼、瘸腿、五官不正、畸形、

en: or a man who has an injured foot or an injured hand,
zh: 斷腳斷手的、

en: or a hunchback or a dwarf or a man with a defect in his sight or an itching disease or scabs or crushed testicles.
zh: 駝背、矮小、眼睛有毛病、長癬、生疹，或是腎子損壞的，都不可走近來，

en: No man of the offspring of Aaron the priest who has a blemish shall come near to offer the LORD's food offerings; since he has a blemish, he shall not come near to offer the bread of his God.
zh: 亞倫祭司的後裔中，有殘疾的，都不可上前來獻耶和華的火祭；他既有殘疾，就不可上前來獻他的 神的食物。

en: He may eat the bread of his God, both of the most holy and of the holy things,
zh: 他 神的食物，無論是至聖的或是聖的，他都可以吃；

en: but he shall not go through the veil or approach the altar, because he has a blemish, that he may not profane my sanctuaries, for I am the LORD who sanctifies them."
zh: 只因他有殘疾，他就不可進到幔子前，也不可上前到我的祭壇那裡，免得褻瀆我的聖所；我是使他們分別為聖的耶和華。”

en: So Moses spoke to Aaron and to his sons and to all the people of Israel.
zh: 於是摩西告訴亞倫和亞倫的兒子，以及所有以色列人。
